title: The Petroleum Act, 1934
full_text: The Petroleum Act, 1934 पेट्रोलियम अधिनियम,1934 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 193430 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1934-09-06 Act Year: 1934 Short Title: The Petroleum Act, 1934 Hindi Title: पेट्रोलियम अधिनियम,1934 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the import, transport, storage, production, refining and blending of petroleum. Ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas Enforcement Date: 30-03-1937 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Petroleum Act, 1934 PRELIMINARY CHAPTER I CONTROL OVER PETROLEUM CHAPER II THE TESTING OF PETROLEUM CHAPTER III PANALTIES AND PROCEDURE CHAPTER IV SUPPLEMENTA Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Import, transport and storage of petroleum. Section 4. Rules for the import, transport and storage of petroleum. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Production, refining and blending of petroleum. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Receptacles of petroleum Class A to show a warning. Section 7. No licence needed for transport or storage of limited quantities of petroleum Class B or petroleum Class C. Section 8. No licence needed for import, transport or storage of small quantities of petroleum Class A. Section 9. Exemptions for motor conveyances and stationary engines. Section 10. No licence needed by railway administration acting as carrier. Section 11. Exemption of heavy oils. Section 12. General power of exemption. Section 13. Inspection of places. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Inspection and sampling of petroleum. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Standard Test Apparatus. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Certification of other test apparatus. Section 17. Testing officers. Section 18. Manner of test. Section 19. Certificate of testing. Section 20. Right to require re-test. Section 21. Power to make rules regarding tests. Show Related Subordinates Section 22. Special rules for testing viscous or solid forms of petroleum. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. General penalty for offences under this Act. Section 24. Confiscation of petroleum and receptacles. Section 25. Jurisdiction. Section 26. Power of entry and search. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Notice of accidents with petroleum. Section 28. Inquiries into serious accidents with petroleum. Section 29. Provisions relating to rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Repealed.. Section 31. Power to limit powers of local authorities over petroleum. Section 32. [Repealed.]. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
